title: One Small Step Can Change Your Life
author: Robert Maurer
subline: The Kaizen way to tiny, lasting change.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A staircase of footprints. 10 footsteps, evenly spaced, climbing diagonally. The 10th is in RED and is just a single point (a small step). Above all the steps: a giant arrow pointing to the goal. The arrow's tip is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1800)" fill="none">
    <!-- 10 footprints climbing diagonally from bottom-left to top-right -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" fill="#4c4c4c">
      <!-- Footprint 1 (smallest, dim) -->
      <ellipse cx="-540" cy="160" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="-525" cy="130" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 2 -->
      <ellipse cx="-440" cy="100" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="-425" cy="70" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 3 -->
      <ellipse cx="-340" cy="40" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="-325" cy="10" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 4 -->
      <ellipse cx="-240" cy="-20" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="-225" cy="-50" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 5 -->
      <ellipse cx="-140" cy="-80" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="-125" cy="-110" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 6 -->
      <ellipse cx="-40" cy="-140" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="-25" cy="-170" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 7 -->
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="-200" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="75" cy="-230" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 8 -->
      <ellipse cx="160" cy="-260" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="175" cy="-290" r="5"/>
      <!-- Footprint 9 -->
      <ellipse cx="260" cy="-320" rx="14" ry="22"/>
      <circle cx="275" cy="-350" r="5"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Footprint 10 — RED, the milestone step -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46">
      <ellipse cx="380" cy="-380" rx="20" ry="32"/>
      <circle cx="400" cy="-420" r="8"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A faint guideline showing the climb -->
    <path d="M -560 180 Q 0 -100 380 -400" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="4 4" fill="none" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">TINY STEPS · TOTAL TRANSFORMATION</text>
</svg>
rationale: Ten footprints climb diagonally across the lower half. The first nine are ash; the tenth — the kaizen step that compounds — is RED and slightly larger. A faint dashed ash line guides the climb. The composition is a path of small steps, ending at one red decisive one. Title 280px mixed case, two lines, weight 500.
